mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (recipient_id, type, related_id, create_time, read_status) VALUES (#{recipientId}, #{type}, #{relatedId}, NOW(), #{readStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT id, recipient_id AS recipientId, type, related_id AS relatedId, create_time AS createTime, read_status AS readStatus FROM notifications WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, recipient_id AS recipientId, type, related_id AS relatedId, create_time AS createTime, read_status AS readStatus FROM notifications WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, recipient_id, type, related_id, create_time, read_status FROM notifications WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND read_status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET read_status = 1 WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND read_status = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND read_status = 0
